narrative:
Precinct 0034 Van Buren South (precinct in Shelby County) has 906 registered voters, with 50.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.2 percentage points.
